messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-570 — Property-suite drift guard: the shared pre-commit hook runs `npm run test:properties` when staged changes can invalidate a property
What it solves: Mechanism precedent to follow: swarmforge/git-hooks/pre-commit +
swarmforge/scripts/check_commit_size.sh (BL-105). The hook is a single
`exec` today, so calling a second guard means the hook itself changes shape
— keep both guards standalone and independently testable rather than
merging their logi…
Approval context: Needs a human ruling before this is promotable, because it changes commit ergonomics for EVERY commit in the repo — including the human's own Cursor and direct-Claude-Code sessions, which is exactly the traffic it is meant to catch. Three things to sign off: (1) whether a pre-commit property gate i…
BL-570 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-570" (or "reject BL-570 <reason>") to act.
